description_long: This house features a modern, single-story layout with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light to the interior. There is a visible garage area with space for multiple vehicles, and a driveway leading up to it. The house includes a fenced yard with green landscaping, and the main entryway is accessible via a short set of steps. The interior layout appears open, with distinct living, dining, and bedroom areas visible through the windows. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a fenced green yard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main entry steps, fenced yard, and a portion of the garage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the garage, driveway, and main glass entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area and rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the living and bedroom areas, as well as the green yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with glass door, short steps, and minimal overhang
